title: Evangelion Alternative Energy Source System
wikitext:
[]: Evangelion: Alternative Energy Source System?             Quote Post by StratoSakuya...AF » Sat Oct 20, 2012 11:48 am I've been thinking this since that trailer came out. There is the screenshot of Asuka inside Eva 02b. However I couldn't come to any conclusions from it at all. However, something brought my attention in this screenshot; SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by TheFriskyIan » Sat Oct 20, 2012 12:32 pm It makes more sense than having a power cable that stretched all the way out of the Stratosphere.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sat Oct 20, 2012 1:12 pm Could be AES Security -- so she's got properly encrypted telemetry But yes, it makes sense that they have something there to permit extended operations beyond the reach of an extension lead, and -- as we could see -- without any bulky add-ons (unless that's what she was surfing on the Aug'11 preview). A Visitor wrote: “You have to power the thing, Unit 02, remotely? You have all these — these technologies, and you don't have fusion? You're still using copper? You should at least have warm superconductors by now, surely."

[]:             Quote Post by driftking18594 » Sat Oct 20, 2012 1:15 pm ^ I'm willing to bet "A Visitor" is The Doctor.

[]:             Quote Post by KnightmareX13 » Sat Oct 20, 2012 1:36 pm [url]http://forum.evageeks.org/post/490567/Evangelion-30-Speculation/#490567[/url]

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sat Oct 20, 2012 1:47 pm Azathoth wrote: AESS = Aerial Entry System System.

[]:             Quote Post by orgsun » Tue Aug 13, 2013 1:18 pm AESS=ADVANCED ENTRY SUPPORT SYSTEM? http://imgur.com/D25NPzb
